goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 0'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '1 people' and '5 nights' starting from 'sunday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 10:15' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'friday' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
Make sure you get 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should include free wifi
The hotel should have a star of 0
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 1 people and 5 nights starting from sunday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 10:15 and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on friday and should go to bishops stortford
